header.layout: Flex justify-between items-center, fixed top-0 w-full z-50

elements.left: 3D rounded rectangular language switcher (Globe icon + 'EN'), 3D square hamburger menu (3 horizontal lines, 12px rounded edges)
elements.drawer: Slides out from the side, vertical nav [الرئيسية, أعمالنا, طلب استشارة, تواصل معنا], elegant 'X' close button

visuals.particles: Slow floating particle/spray network using react-tsparticles

elements.ai_pill: Thin transparent rounded pill with glowing AI Star icon and text 'وكالة رقمية رائدة', 2cm below header
elements.headline_container: Edge-to-edge wide horizontal container with smooth rounded borders
elements.headline: Massive bold text 'صناع تغيير'
elements.subheadline: Clean white text 'نحول أفكارك الرقمية إلى واقع ملموس بتصاميم استثنائية وحلول تقنية متقدمة'

buttons.primary: Solid White, dark typography, 12px radius, arrow icon

portfolio_showcase.header: Title 'أعمالنا' and subtext 'استعرض مجموعة من أفضل المشاريع التي أنجزناها لعملائنا'

filters.tier_1: Segmented filter: [الكل, السوق العربي, السوق الأجنبي]
filters.tier_2: Segmented filter: [الكل, مواقع إلكترونية, متاجر رقمية, أخرى]

portfolio_showcase.grid: Responsive bento grid, soft 3D shadows, 12px rounded corners
portfolio_showcase.empty_state: لا توجد مشاريع في هذه الفئة

consultation_form.title: اطلب مشروعك الآن
consultation_form.fields: Name, email, phone (optional), service type dropdown, details textarea
consultation_form.submit_button: 3D button with paper airplane icon 'إرسال الطلب'

contact_section.cards: Three Cards with 3D depth. Phone ('اضغط للاتصال'), Support ('متاحون على مدار الساعة'), Email

footer.style: Minimalist footer with 'mergent' brand and 2026 copyright

features: CRUD for Portfolio Projects (Title, Image Upload, Market Type, Project Category, Live URL)
Leads Inbox (table view of consultation requests)

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply dir='rtl' globally in the root HTML tag.
Implement the floating WhatsApp widget in the bottom corner with a z-index ensuring it sits above everything.
Use 'react-tsparticles' (or 'tsparticles') for the background particle effect in the hero section.
Do not use generic Shadcn components out-of-the-box without tailoring them to the 12px border radius and 3D shadow guidelines.
Every button and input must use the dark contrast text (#112325) when placed on the white background.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute for QA automation.
Fonts 'Cairo' and 'Tajawal' should be imported via Google Fonts or next/font.
Ensure 'أعمالنا' CTA button is solid white and 'طلب استشارة' is transparent outlined, as strictly defined.
